calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-13-2016 Continued To Nov-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alicia Gamez for (petitioner) Araceli Gravino. Ann MacArthur for (trustee) Jorge Perez.

Ms. Gamez stated that they have reached a settlement, that the parties are performing, that the respondent is out of the property and it is being sold, that once it is sold it will be wrapped up and distributed and asked about a continuance of the trial set for department 206. The Court stated that the matter is no longer under its jurisdiction and that they may need to file an ex parte petition in that department. The status on mediation is off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Continued To Apr-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Istruct Trustee. (1 Of 2)& (2 Of2)
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Continued To Jun-13-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Petition To Istruct Trustee. (1 Of 2)& (2 Of2)
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Continued To Apr-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Istruct Trustee. (1 Of 2)& (2 Of2)
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Continued To Mar-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alicia Gamez for (petitioner) Araceli Gravino. Jon Vaught for (respondent) Adelia Hizjida.

The Court stated that it has no problem referring the parties to Pro Bono Mediation and would like to give them a trial date as well and the parties agreed on a June trial date. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 29, 2016. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 24, 2016. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on March 14, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on June 13, 2016 , (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition To Istruct Trustee. (1 Of 2)& (2 Of2)
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Continued To Nov-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Istruct Trustee. (1 Of 2)& (2 Of2)
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Continued To Oct-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alicia Gamez for (petitioner) Araceli Gravino. Jon Vaught for (respondent) Adelaida Hijazi.

The Court asked how the informal negotiations were going. Ms. Gamez reported that they are making reasonable progress and need a 60 day continuance. Mr. Vaught stated that they are down to $100,000.00 at issue and are trying to keep costs down. The Petition to instruct trustee was continued to October 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition To Istruct Trustee. (1 Of 2)& (2 Of2)
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Continued To Aug-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Istruct Trustee. (1 Of 2)& (2 Of2)
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Jul-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alicia Gamez for (Petitioner) Araceli Gravino. William Holsman for (Trustee) Jorge Perez. Jon Vaught for (Respondent) Adelaida Hijazi.

Ms. Gamez stated that the parties would like a continuance and that they believe they can settle the matter between them. The Petition to Instruct Trustee was continued to July 20, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
